shallow_families.family: Ullmann Biaryl Ether and Biaryl Amine Synthesis / Condensation
raw_family_names_collapsed: Ullmann Biaryl Ether and Biaryl Amine Synthesis / Condensation

recent_curated_extract_summaries.transformation_text: Application example: condensation of aniline with acetylacetone to give 2,4-dimethylquinoline.
Application example: condensation of p-anisidine with acetylacetone to give a methoxy-substituted dimethylquinoline.
Application example: Corey-Kim oxidation of benzyl alcohol to benzaldehyde.
Application example: Corey-Kim oxidation of 1-phenylethanol to acetophenone.
Application example: Darzens glycidic ester condensation of benzaldehyde with ethyl chloroacetate to an epoxide ester.
Application example: Darzens glycidic ester condensation of p-anisaldehyde with methyl chloroacetate to an anisyl epoxide ester.
Application example: Friedel-Crafts acylation of benzene with acetyl chloride to acetophenone.
Application example: Friedel-Crafts acylation of anisole with propionyl chloride to para-methoxypropiophenone.
Application example: Friedel-Crafts alkylation of benzene with tert-butyl chloride to tert-butylbenzene.
Application example: Friedel-Crafts alkylation of toluene with isopropyl chloride to cymene.
